# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:

# HTTP - Allow from anywhere (public web traffic)
- name: allow-http-public
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "80"
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    targetTags:
      - http-server
    description: "Allow HTTP traffic from anywhere to tagged instances"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# HTTPS - Allow from anywhere (public web traffic)
- name: allow-https-public
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    targetTags:
      - https-server
    description: "Allow HTTPS traffic from anywhere to tagged instances"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# SSH - Restricted to trusted CIDR ranges only
# SECURITY: Replace with your corporate VPN/office IP ranges
# Use 'gcloud compute firewall-rules list' to audit
- name: allow-ssh-restricted
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 900
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "22"
    sourceRanges:
      # TODO: Replace these with your actual corporate/VPN CIDR ranges
      - "203.0.113.0/24"    # Example: Corporate office IP range
      - "198.51.100.0/24"   # Example: VPN egress IP range
      - "35.235.240.0/20"   # Google Cloud IAP range for IAP TCP forwarding
    targetTags:
      - allow-ssh
    description: "Allow SSH only from trusted networks and IAP. Do NOT open to 0.0.0.0/0"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# RDP - Restricted to trusted CIDR ranges only
# SECURITY: Replace with your corporate VPN/office IP ranges
- name: allow-rdp-restricted
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 900
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "3389"
    sourceRanges:
      # TODO: Replace these with your actual corporate/VPN CIDR ranges
      - "203.0.113.0/24"    # Example: Corporate office IP range
      - "198.51.100.0/24"   # Example: VPN egress IP range
      - "35.235.240.0/20"   # Google Cloud IAP range for IAP TCP forwarding
    targetTags:
      - allow-rdp
    description: "Allow RDP only from trusted networks and IAP. Do NOT open to 0.0.0.0/0"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Explicit deny-all ingress at low priority as a safety net
- name: deny-all-ingress-default
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: all
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    description: "Default deny all ingress traffic - safety net rule"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

outputs:
  - name: ssh-firewall-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-ssh-restricted.selfLink)
  - name: rdp-firewall-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-rdp-restricted.selfLink)
  - name: http-firewall-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-http-public.selfLink)
  - name: https-firewall-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-https-public.selfLink)
